message.html:
New Laboratory Inquiry

Contact Information

Name: Arielle Estrella

Email: aaestrella1@up.edu.ph

Affiliation: Institute of Fish Processing Technology UPV CFOS

Designation: Instructor

Service Details

Service Type: laboratory

Species: animal

Research Overview: The study aims to isolate and characterize proteolytic bacteria from tuna viscera fermented for 10 days using the backslopping technique. Identification will be carried out through biochemical analyses, to be conducted at the Fisheries Microbiology Laboratory, and complemented by metagenomic sequencing until the species level (if possible) at the Philippine Genome Center Visayas. In line with this, may I kindly inquire about the cost per sample, as well as the required quantity and preservation method for sample submission? Additionally, I would appreciate it if you could provide information on any other technical requirements.

Sample Count: 1

Workflow Type: Complete Workflow

Individual Assay Details: 16s rRNA gene sequencing

Inquiry ID: 8V9oQzVu3C4UhC7ujZ0r
